title: A2 interview answers
subtitle: Answer personal questions with detail.
overview: A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: I am learning English because I want to use it in daily life.
我学英语，因为我想在日常生活中使用它。
In the future, I want to speak more naturally.

I am learning English because I want to use it in daily life.
items.zh: 我学英语，因为我想在日常生活中使用它。

items.en: This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.en: I am learning English because I want to use it in daily life.

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: In the future, I want to speak more naturally.

items.en: I am learning English because I want to use it in daily life.
items.zh: 我学英语，因为我想在日常生活中使用它。

items.en: In the future, I want to speak more naturally.
Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
